title: Single Tool Then Result
description: Use one registered tool, then turn its output into the final answer.
when_to_use: One available tool can provide the needed external information.
The user wants a direct answer based on that tool result.
skeleton: tool: call the registered tool with explicit args_template when possible
result: answer using only the tool output
adaptation_notes: Use only tool names listed in Available tools; reject if no registered tool can do the job.
If tool arguments depend on upstream context, keep args_template limited to known static values and declare context_needed.
